title: Add ScreenFlow Prototype View to @archmap/core
description: Added ScreenFlow model/parser/validation support and a built-in prototype base view on top of the existing @archmap/core render/custom-element architecture.
decision_notes: This is not a new engine. It extends existing @archmap/core types, metadata parser, validation, registerView/render, RenderResult optional methods, custom element attributes, controls, docs, and examples.
Prototype View is implemented as a DOM MountableView so images, hotspot clicks, scenario selector, and transition controls can be managed without reparsing.
Image URLs are assigned through DOM attributes and validated with a protocol allowlist; javascript:/data: URLs are rejected by image_url_disallowed.

The Node/Vitest test environment has no browser backend or DOM implementation, so click-level browser smoke remains a follow-up. Parser, validation, render registry, custom attribute parsing, full tests, build, and local HTTP asset serving were verified.
